text: Five killed, dozens injured in crash on I-95 in Stafford County, Virginia - The Washington Post
fullText: The crash, involving a bus and six vehicles, was declared a 'Mass Casualty Incident,' authorities said.

text: Over half of Great American State Fair performers drop out over politics, threats - The Washington Post
fullText: Bret Michaels and Martina McBride are the latest artists to pull out of the Great American State Fair concert series organized by Freedom 250 on the National Mall this summer.

text: Map: A visual guide to the Laos cave rescue - CNN
fullText: Here’s everything CNN knows about how the rescue operation has unfolded so far and the depths to which the rescuers have had to dive to reach the trapped men.

text: New California Governor Poll Shows a Slim but Growing Chance of 2 Democrats Advancing - KQED
fullText: Xavier Becerra leads the field, trailed closely by Steve Hilton and Tom Steyer, in the latest survey from the UC Berkeley Institute of Governmental Studies.

text: Music giant Universal rejects billionaire Bill Ackman's takeover bid - BBC
fullText: The music giant said Pershing Square's offer fundamentally undervalued the business.

text: Trump's name must be removed from Kennedy Center, judge orders - Axios
fullText: "Congress gave the Kennedy Center its name, and only Congress can change it," the judge wrote in his ruling.

text: Eddie Hearn dares Dana White to release Tom Aspinall from UFC contract - MMA Fighting
fullText: Eddie Hearn guarantees he will pay Tom Aspinall more than the UFC.

text: WHO suspects 906 cases, 223 deaths from Bundibugyo strain of Ebola - KSL.com
fullText: The World Health Organization said on Friday there were 906 suspected cases of Ebola in the Democratic Republic of Congo, including 223 suspected deaths that were being investigated.

text: Djokovic, Fonseca into fifth set of Roland Garros R3 thriller - ATP Tour
fullText: Joao Fonseca brought his penchant for the big stage to Roland Garros in style on Friday evening, when the #NextGenATP Brazilian rallied from two sets down to shock record 24-time major champion Novak Djokovic.

text: Pam Bondi tells lawmakers ‘redaction errors’ were made in Epstein files release - NBC News
fullText: Former Attorney General Pam Bondi told lawmakers on the House Oversight Committee on Friday that the Justice Department made “redaction errors” in its release of records related to Jeffrey Epstein, according to a copy of her opening statement obtained by NBC …

text: Romania: Russian drone strikes Galati apartment building - DW.com
fullText: Romania accused Russia of a "grave and irresponsible escalation" after a Russian drone entered its airspace. German Chancellor Merz said "we need a strong NATO presence on the eastern flank" after the incident.

text: U.S. CFTC opens crypto 'perp' door with first approval at regulated firm - CoinDesk
fullText: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission has now established a stance on how regulated U.S. firms can engage in crypto perpetual futures contracts.

text: Louisiana Republicans pass gerrymandered map that eliminates majority-Black district - Politico
fullText: The new map has five of the state’s six House districts as GOP-leaning.

text: Microsoft under fire for threatening security researcher with criminal investigation - TechCrunch
fullText: A public spat between Microsoft and an independent security researcher reopens a long-running debate over who is responsible for securing software.

text: ‘60 Minutes’ Future Won’t Look Like Its Past. New Chief Nick Bilton May Try “Gonzo Journalism” - The Hollywood Reporter
fullText: Its incoming exec producer reveals early plans (including beat correspondents) as the overhaul hits insiders “like a ton of bricks" after being telegraphed by CBS News editor in chief Bari Weiss.

text: Pigeons navigate using magnetic sensors in livers — study - DW.com
fullText: A research team in Germany has published new data on how pigeons use magnetic fields as a navigation method when visibility is limited. A key part of the long-sought answer could lie in an unexpected organ, their livers.
